name: Stündenglass x Modül + Dok Deluxe Travel Set
summary: A complete portable system for dry herb and concentrates, with the Modül heater, Dok glass and travel case.
description: This Stündenglass set pairs the Modül electronic heating unit with interchangeable dry-herb and quartz concentrate tanks, plus the Dok borosilicate glass attachment for smoother, cooler draws. An adjustable carb cap helps manage airflow, and the whole kit ships in a protective travel case with dedicated storage. Heat-up runs roughly 15–45 seconds depending on tank and setting. It suits a patient who uses both flower and extracts and wants one design-led, portable system rather than separate devices. It's a high-end bundle, so it makes most sense for someone who'll use both tanks rather than just one.
